name: HP Up
description: Permanently raises a Pokémon's HP EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in HP — after that, no further effect.

name: Protein
description: Permanently raises Attack EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in Attack.

name: Iron
description: Permanently raises Defense EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in Defense.

name: Calcium
description: Permanently raises Special Attack EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in Sp. Atk.

name: Zinc
description: Permanently raises Special Defense EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in Sp. Def.

name: Carbos
description: Permanently raises Speed EVs by 10. Caps at 100 EVs in Speed.

name: PP Up
description: Increases the max PP of a single move by 20% of its base. Can be used up to 3 times per move.

name: PP Max
description: Maxes out the PP of a single move (equivalent to 3 PP Ups in one go).

name: Rare Candy
description: Levels up a Pokémon by 1 instantly. Skips earned EVs from battles though, so heavy use can leave a mon under-statted.

name: Exp. Candy XS
description: Grants 100 Exp to one Pokémon.

name: Exp. Candy S
description: Grants 800 Exp to one Pokémon.

name: Exp. Candy M
description: Grants 3,000 Exp to one Pokémon.

name: Exp. Candy L
description: Grants 10,000 Exp to one Pokémon.

name: Exp. Candy XL
description: Grants 30,000 Exp to one Pokémon.

name: Potion
description: Restores 20 HP to one Pokémon. Cheap in-battle pinch heal.

name: Super Potion
description: Restores 60 HP to one Pokémon.

name: Hyper Potion
description: Restores 120 HP to one Pokémon.

name: Max Potion
description: Fully restores HP to one Pokémon.

name: Full Restore
description: Fully restores HP AND clears all status conditions on one Pokémon.

name: Fresh Water
description: Drink that restores 30 HP. Cheap field heal.

name: Soda Pop
description: Restores 50 HP to one Pokémon.

name: Lemonade
description: Restores 70 HP to one Pokémon.

name: Moomoo Milk
description: Creamy drink that restores 100 HP to one Pokémon.

name: Antidote
description: Cures Poison status on one Pokémon.

name: Awakening
description: Wakes a sleeping Pokémon.

name: Burn Heal
description: Cures Burn status on one Pokémon.

name: Ice Heal
description: Thaws a frozen Pokémon.

name: Paralyze Heal
description: Cures Paralysis on one Pokémon.

name: Full Heal
description: Cures any status condition on one Pokémon.

name: Revive
description: Revives a fainted Pokémon with half HP.

name: Max Revive
description: Revives a fainted Pokémon with full HP.

name: Revival Herb
description: Revives a fainted Pokémon with full HP — but herbs lower friendship.

name: Energy Powder
description: Restores 50 HP. Bitter — lowers friendship slightly.

name: Energy Root
description: Restores 200 HP. Very bitter — lowers friendship.

name: Heal Powder
description: Cures any status condition. Bitter — lowers friendship.

name: Ether
description: Restores 10 PP to one move.

name: Max Ether
description: Fully restores PP of one move.

name: Elixir
description: Restores 10 PP to all moves.

name: Max Elixir
description: Fully restores PP of all moves.

name: X Attack
description: Raises a Pokémon's Attack by one stage during this battle only.

name: X Defense
description: Raises Defense by one stage during this battle only.

name: X Sp. Atk
description: Raises Special Attack by one stage during this battle only.

name: X Sp. Def
description: Raises Special Defense by one stage during this battle only.

name: X Speed
description: Raises Speed by one stage during this battle only.

name: X Accuracy
description: Raises Accuracy by one stage during this battle only.

name: Dire Hit
description: Sharply raises a Pokémon's critical-hit chance for the rest of the battle.

name: Guard Spec.
description: Prevents the opponent from lowering your Pokémon's stats for 5 turns.

name: Cheri Berry
description: Cures Paralysis when held — auto-eaten if the Pokémon is paralyzed.

name: Chesto Berry
description: Wakes the holder up if it falls asleep.

name: Pecha Berry
description: Cures Poison when held.

name: Rawst Berry
description: Cures Burn when held.

name: Aspear Berry
description: Thaws the holder if it gets frozen.

name: Persim Berry
description: Snaps the holder out of confusion.

name: Lum Berry
description: Cures any status condition (or confusion) when held. The all-purpose status berry.

name: Leppa Berry
description: Restores 10 PP to a move that ran out. Auto-uses when a move hits 0 PP.

name: Oran Berry
description: Restores 10 HP. Auto-eaten when the holder drops below 50% HP.

name: Sitrus Berry
description: Restores 25% of max HP. Auto-eaten below 50% HP. Stronger than Oran.

name: Liechi Berry
description: Sharply raises Attack when the holder drops to 25% HP or less.

name: Petaya Berry
description: Sharply raises Sp. Atk when the holder drops to 25% HP or less.

name: Ganlon Berry
description: Sharply raises Defense when the holder drops to 25% HP or less.

name: Apicot Berry
description: Sharply raises Sp. Def when the holder drops to 25% HP or less.

name: Salac Berry
description: Sharply raises Speed when the holder drops to 25% HP or less.

name: Lansat Berry
description: Boosts critical-hit ratio when HP drops to 25% or less.

name: Starf Berry
description: Sharply raises a random stat when HP drops to 25% or less.

name: Custap Berry
description: Lets the holder act first one time when HP is critical.

name: Jaboca Berry
description: Damages the attacker when the holder is hit by a physical move.

name: Rowap Berry
description: Damages the attacker when the holder is hit by a special move.

name: Enigma Berry
description: Restores 25% HP when hit by a super-effective move.

name: Occa Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Fire move (one-time).

name: Passho Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Water move (one-time).

name: Wacan Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Electric move (one-time).

name: Rindo Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Grass move (one-time).

name: Yache Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Ice move (one-time).

name: Chople Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Fighting move (one-time).

name: Kebia Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Poison move (one-time).

name: Shuca Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Ground move (one-time).

name: Coba Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Flying move (one-time).

name: Payapa Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Psychic move (one-time).

name: Tanga Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Bug move (one-time).

name: Charti Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Rock move (one-time).

name: Kasib Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Ghost move (one-time).

name: Haban Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Dragon move (one-time).

name: Colbur Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Dark move (one-time).

name: Babiri Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Steel move (one-time).

name: Roseli Berry
description: Halves damage from a super-effective Fairy move (one-time).

name: Chilan Berry
description: Halves damage from a Normal-type move (one-time, even if not super-effective).

name: Razz Berry
description: A flavor berry — bait for catching, no battle effect.

name: Bluk Berry
description: Flavor berry — used in cooking and crafting.

name: Nanab Berry
description: Flavor berry — calms wild Pokémon.

name: Wepear Berry
description: Flavor berry — sweet/tart, mostly cooking.

name: Pinap Berry
description: Flavor berry — sometimes drops more catch items.
